en: A SONG. A PSALM OF ASAPH.O God, do not keep silence; do not hold your peace or be still, O God!
zh: 神啊！求你不要靜默； 神啊！求你不要閉口，也不要一言不發。

en: For behold, your enemies make an uproar; those who hate you have raised their heads.
zh: 看哪！你的仇敵喧嘩， 恨你的人都抬起頭來。

en: They lay crafty plans against your people; they consult together against your treasured ones.
zh: 他們密謀奸詐，陷害你的子民； 他們彼此商議，攻擊你所寶貴的人。

en: They say, "Come, let us wipe them out as a nation; let the name of Israel be remembered no more!"
zh: 他們說：“來吧！我們來把他們除滅，使他們不再成國， 使以色列的名不再被人記念。”

en: For they conspire with one accord; against you they make a covenant-
zh: 他們同心商議， 彼此結盟，要和你對抗。

en: the tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites, Moab and the Hagrites,
zh: 他們就是住帳棚的以東人和以實瑪利人， 摩押人和夏甲人，

en: Gebal and Ammon and Amalek, Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;
zh: 迦巴勒、亞捫、亞瑪力、 非利士和推羅的居民。

en: Asshur also has joined them; they are the strong arm of the children of Lot. Selah
zh: 亞述也和他們聯合起來， 作了羅得子孫的幫手。

en: Do to them as you did to Midian, as to Sisera and Jabin at the river Kishon,
zh: 求你待他們好像待米甸人， 像在基順河待西西拉和耶賓一樣；

en: who were destroyed at En-dor, who became dung for the ground.
zh: 他們都在隱．多珥被消滅， 成了地上的糞土。

en: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb, all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna,
zh: 求你使他們的貴族像俄立和西伊伯， 使他們的王子像西巴和撒慕拿。

en: who said, "Let us take possession for ourselves of the pastures of God."
zh: 他們曾說： “我們要得著 神的牧場作自己的產業。”

en: O my God, make them like whirling dust, like chaff before the wind.
zh: 我的 神啊！求你使他們像旋風捲起的草， 像風前的碎稭。

en: As fire consumes the forest, as the flame sets the mountains ablaze,
zh: 火怎樣焚燒樹林， 火燄怎樣燃燒群山，

en: so may you pursue them with your tempest and terrify them with your hurricane!
zh: 求你也照樣用狂風追趕他們， 藉暴風雨驚嚇他們。

en: Fill their faces with shame, that they may seek your name, O LORD.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你使他們滿面羞愧， 好使他們尋求你的名。

en: Let them be put to shame and dismayed forever; let them perish in disgrace,
zh: 願他們永遠受辱驚惶， 願他們抱愧滅亡。

en: that they may know that you alone, whose name is the LORD, are the Most High over all the earth.
zh: 使他們知道只有你的名是耶和華， 唯有你是掌管全地的至高者。
